<div align="center">

<!-- BANNER com imagem embutida + texto sobreposto -->
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" width="100%" viewBox="0 0 860 220">
  <defs>
    <clipPath id="bannerClip">
      <rect width="860" height="220" rx="12" ry="12"/>
    </clipPath>
    <linearGradient id="grad" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#000000" stop-opacity="0.25"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#000000" stop-opacity="0.65"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <!-- Imagem de fundo -->
  <image href="data:image/jpeg;base64,"
         x="0" y="0" width="860" height="220"
         preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice"
         clip-path="url(#bannerClip)"/>
  <!-- Overlay escuro -->
  <rect width="860" height="220" fill="url(#grad)" clip-path="url(#bannerClip)"/>
  <!-- Texto Welcome -->
  <text x="430" y="88" font-family="monospace" font-size="13"
        fill="#cccccc" text-anchor="middle" letter-spacing="4">Wellcome to</text>
  <!-- Nome principal -->
  <text x="430" y="128" font-family="monospace" font-size="26" font-weight="bold"
        fill="#ffffff" text-anchor="middle" letter-spacing="1">Murilo Tadashi's Github</text>
  <!-- Tag de código -->
  <text x="430" y="168" font-family="monospace" font-size="20"
        fill="#aaaaaa" text-anchor="middle">&lt;/&gt;</text>
</svg>

<br/>

<!-- LINKS SOCIAIS -->
[![LINKEDIN](https://img.shields.io/badge/LINKEDIN-%230d0d0d.svg?style=for-the-badge&logo=linkedin&logoColor=a0a0b0)](https://linkedin.com/in/higuchi5)
[![GITHUB](https://img.shields.io/badge/GITHUB-%230d0d0d.svg?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&logoColor=a0a0b0)](https://github.com/higuchi5)
[![PORTFOLIO](https://img.shields.io/badge/PORTFOLIO-%230d0d0d.svg?style=for-the-badge&logo=vercel&logoColor=a0a0b0)](https://higuchi5.dev)
[![EMAIL](https://img.shields.io/badge/EMAIL-%230d0d0d.svg?style=for-the-badge&logo=gmail&logoColor=a0a0b0)](mailto:murilo@email.com)

<br/><br/>

</div>

<!-- ABOUT ME -->
<h3 align="center">🧑‍💻 About me</h3>

<table align="center" border="0" width="90%">
<tr>
<td width="60%" valign="top">

Hello! I'm **Murilo Tadashi Higuchi**, a Systems Engineering student. I enjoy learning new technologies and problem solving. Now I'm working on some little and fun projects to put in practice my knowledge about JavaScript, Node, and more.

&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;🎓 Studying Systems Engineering<br/>
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;💻 Backend & Systems Developer<br/>
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;♟️ Chess Player<br/>
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;📍 Brazil 🇧🇷

</td>
<td width="40%" align="center" valign="middle">

<img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/higuchi5/higuchi5/main/foto.jpg" width="200" style="border-radius:12px"/>

</td>
</tr>
</table>

<br/>
